FAQs

 Most repairs are completed the same day or within 24-48 hours. Screen replacements usually take 2-4 hours. We'll give you a timeline during the diagnosis.

Yes! As authorised Apple technicians, myComputerENGR uses genuine Apple parts for all Apple devices. For other brands, we use high-quality compatible parts.

We provide a free diagnosis. If repair isn't viable, we'll discuss alternatives like refurbished replacements or data recovery options.

On-site visits are FREE within Ibadan! You only pay for the parts and labour of the actual repair.

Yes, all repairs come with a 3-6 month warranty depending on the service.

 In most cases, yes! Our data recovery success rate is high. Contact us for an assessment.

Follow us on TikTok @myComputerENGR for repair tutorials, device reviews, tech tips, and special promotions!
